title: Medical device use in hospital and clinic settings - Canada.ca
content:
## Hospital and clinic devices
Hospital and clinic devices are medical devices that health care providers use to support patient diagnosis and care or for their own health and safety.
Read more about some types of hospital and clinic medical devices.
About mammography, mammograms as a screening tool, radiation exposure, minimizing your risk, Health Canada's role
About risks with whole body screening using MRI or CT machines, minimizing your risk, Health Canada's role
About pulse oximeters, information for consumers and health care providers, Health Canada's role

### Non-contact infrared thermometers (NCITs)
About NCITs and COVID-19, factors that influence their accuracy, best practices, recommendations for using NCITs

### Heater-cooler devices
About heater-cooler devices, who is affected, reporting a problem or concern

Information for hospitals, warning labels, reporting a problem or concern
